computed_fields.PayrollEntry.net_pay: gross_pay - federal_income_tax - state_income_tax - social_security_tax - medicare_tax - other_deductions_total
computed_fields.PayrollRun.taxes_total: SUM(payroll_entries.federal_income_tax + state_income_tax + social_security_tax + medicare_tax WHERE payroll_run_id = id)

domain_rules.rule: Terminated employees cannot be included in new payroll runs
domain_rules.api_guard: reject if employee.termination_date IS NOT NULL AND employee.termination_date <= payroll_run.period_start
domain_rules.ui_behavior: filter out terminated employees from employee selection; show warning badge

domain_rules.rule: Payroll run period cannot overlap with another paid run for same frequency
domain_rules.api_guard: check for existing paid payroll_runs with overlapping period_start/period_end for same org and frequency
domain_rules.ui_behavior: show overlap error in form before submission
domain_rules.db_constraint: EXCLUDE USING gist (org_id WITH =, frequency WITH =, daterange(period_start, period_end, '[]') WITH &&) WHERE (status = 'paid')

domain_rules.rule: Net pay must not be negative
domain_rules.api_guard: reject if net_pay < 0 after deductions; return 422 with field-level error
domain_rules.ui_behavior: show red highlight on net_pay field; block confirmation action

domain_rules.rule: Approved payroll runs cannot be edited — must cancel and recreate
domain_rules.api_guard: reject PATCH on payroll_run or payroll_entry if payroll_run.status IN ['approved', 'paid']
domain_rules.ui_behavior: disable all edit controls; show informational banner with Cancel Run CTA

domain_rules.rule: Social security tax capped at annual wage base ($160,200 for 2024)
domain_rules.api_guard: track YTD social_security taxable wages per employee; cap additional withholding once wage_base reached

domain_rules.rule: Pre-tax deductions reduce federal/state taxable income but not FICA
domain_rules.api_guard: subtract pre_tax deductions from income before computing federal_income_tax and state_income_tax; use gross_pay for FICA base

employees.description: List employees with pagination and filters
List past payroll entries for employee

payroll_runs.description: Auto-calculate all entries for the run
Mark payroll run as paid; triggers payslip generation

payroll_entries.description: List entries for a payroll run
Manual override for a payroll entry (draft runs only)

flows.name: Run Payroll
steps: Create PayrollRun: POST /payroll-runs with period_start, period_end, pay_date, frequency

Process run: POST /payroll-runs/:id/process — for each active employee fetch current salary, calculate base_pay, apply hours_worked if hourly, add bonus/commission/overtime, apply employee deductions (fixed or percentage of gross), compute federal/state taxable income after pre-tax deductions, calculate tax withholdings using tax tables for jurisdiction, compute gross_pay and net_pay, create PayrollEntry per employee
Review entries in PayrollRunDetail/Entries tab; override individual entries via PATCH /payroll-entries/:id if needed
Approve run: POST /payroll-runs/:id/approve — requires admin or payroll_admin role
Mark as paid: POST /payroll-runs/:id/pay — triggers payslip generation, journal entry creation, employee last_pay_date update
cross_entity_updates: TaxWithholding records created per entry during process

credits: CR Payroll Taxes Payable = taxes_total + employer_taxes_total

flows.name: Calculate Deductions
steps: For each active employee deduction where effective_date <= period_end AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date >= period_start)
If amount_type = fixed, apply amount directly
If amount_type = percentage, apply amount * gross_pay / 100
If is_pre_tax = true, subtract from federal and state taxable income (not FICA base)
Sum all applied deductions into payroll_entry.other_deductions_total

flows.name: Generate Payslip
steps: POST /payroll-runs/:id/payslip triggers payslip generation job
For each PayrollEntry in run, generate PDF with employee info, gross_pay breakdown, deductions table, tax withholdings table, net_pay
Store generated PDF as attachment in AWS S3
Emit payslip.generated websocket event with download_url
Send email to employee with payslip attachment

deleted_at.notes: Soft delete — all queries filter deleted_at IS NULL

org_id_injection.middleware: req.body.org_id is stripped; injected from req.user.org_id

conflict_response.message: Record was modified by another user. Refresh and retry.

concurrency.high_contention_tables: see entities with high write concurrency

patterns.name: write_with_audit
steps: BEGIN
acquire_row_lock
validate_business_rules
write_entity
write_audit_log
COMMIT

patterns.name: bulk_operation
steps: BEGIN
validate_all_records
write_batch
write_audit_log_batch
COMMIT

audit_trail.triggers: application-level (before write hook) — never DB trigger to avoid log bloat

standard_constraints.name: chk_{table}_deleted_order
standard_constraints.expression: deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at

db_constraints_policy.enum_validation: DB ENUM types preferred over VARCHAR + CHECK; enum values defined in global enums registry

soft_delete_policy.filter: deleted_at IS NULL applied globally via query builder middleware
soft_delete_policy.cascade: Parent delete soft-deletes children via application cascade, not DB cascade
soft_delete_policy.hard_delete: Prohibited in production; available only via admin CLI with audit log
soft_delete_policy.restore: Set deleted_at = NULL; triggers audit log entry

naming_conventions.date_fields: Always use _at suffix for TIMESTAMPTZ, _date suffix for DATE
naming_conventions.id_fields: Primary key is always id; foreign keys are {entity}_id
